name: Marumi Fit + Slim FS Plus UV
description: The Marumi FS PLUS UV is a new basic model UV control filter with a water-repellent function adhered, well suited to whom easy-maintenance is a higher priority.

features.Key Features:: Diameter : 46mm | UV control filter with water-repellent coating | Fingerprint-resistant UV-coated white optical glass | High transmittance approximately more than 98.7% (400-700nm average rate) | Eight layers of Anti-reflection coating sustain a reflection rate under 0.4%. (420-680nm average) | Thin aluminum frame to avoid vignetting even with a wide-angle lens | Made in Japan optical precision and performance
